canonical_question: How do you cross-reference raw signals with firmographic data for actionable leads?
constraints: Enrichment data providers (Clearbit, Apollo, LinkedIn) have rate limits and per-record costs ($0.01-$0.50/lookup)
Company ownership resolution fails for subsidiaries and shell entities without corporate hierarchy data
Decision-maker identification accuracy degrades for organizations with >500 employees due to role ambiguity
GDPR/CCPA compliance required when enriching with personal contact data in EU/US jurisdictions
Enrichment data freshness varies: LinkedIn profiles update in real-time; corporate filings lag 30-90 days

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs raw signal detection methods, not enrichment of existing signals
User needs to generate outreach assets from enriched data
